ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the country */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the country (e.g., high, middle, low) */,
  "development_status" TEXT /* Development status of the country (e.g., developed, developing, least developed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_development_status FOREIGN KEY ("development_status") REFERENCES development_statuses ("development_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_income_level FOREIGN KEY ("income_level") REFERENCES income_levels ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi" (
  "hdi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HDI value */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "hdi_value" REAL /* HDI value (range: 0-1) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the HDI value was reported */,
  "hdi_category" TEXT /* HDI category (e.g., very high, high, medium, low) */,
  "hdi_ranking" INTEGER /* HDI ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hdi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "life_expectancy" (
  "life_expectancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each life expectancy value */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "life_expectancy_value" REAL /* Life expectancy value in years */,
  "male_life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth for males */,
  "female_life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth for females */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the life expectancy value was reported */,
  "life_expectancy_ranking" INTEGER /* Life expectancy ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("life_expectancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_life_expectancy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education metric */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "expected_years" REAL /* Expected years of schooling */,
  "mean_years" REAL /* Mean years of schooling */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate */,
  "education_expenditure" REAL /* Education expenditure as a percentage of GDP */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the education metrics were reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gni" (
  "gni_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GNI value */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "gni_value" REAL /* GNI value per capita */,
  "gni_per_capita_ppp" REAL /* GNI per capita in PPP terms */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the GNI value was reported */,
  "gni_ranking" INTEGER /* GNI ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gni_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gni_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code of the region */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_levels" (
  "income_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income level */,
  "income_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the income level (e.g., high, middle, low) */,
  "income_level_code" TEXT /* Code of the income level */,
  "income_level_description" TEXT /* Description of the income level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "development_statuses" (
  "development_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development status */,
  "development_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the development status (e.g., developed, developing, least developed) */,
  "development_status_code" TEXT /* Code of the development status */,
  "development_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the development status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("development_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_log_details" TEXT /* Details of the access log */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was created */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
